    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static @interface 
    Meta.ObjectType
    ObjectTypes are the default classification, so usually do not need to be explicitly used.
    static @interface 
    Meta.PrimitiveType
    For enums only?
    static @interface 
    Meta.RecordType
    A record is an structured data type that can only hold primitives, enumeration values and other records.
